channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: For America's Service Members, Memorial Day Is a Lifetime
item.description: Military members and their families endure hardships that often go unnoticed in the news.

item.title: Memorial Day at 250
item.description: We owe so much to so few.

item.title: The USO Does God's Work
item.description: We set aside Memorial Day for the dead, and rightly so.

item.title: The Empty Desks Are Telling Us Something
item.description: When students stop showing up, the education establishment treats it as a discipline problem. It may be closer to a performance review.
